COMPLAINT FAILS TO ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SLANDER OF TITLE. PLAINTIFF CITES NO AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS RE-SETS EVERY DAY DEFENDANT REFUSES TO RE-CONVEY THE TITLE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Howard Olsen, Esq. of Law Offices of Michael Heath, (415-931-4207), for Hemlata G. Vyas, Plaintiff and opposing party.
No other appearance.

No arguments heard. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs EDWARD BERMAN and INTERSPACE, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the slander of title cause of action. It is barred by statute of limitations. ) Stalber v. Westrn Title (1991) 230 Cal.App.3rd 1223, 1230; CCP 338(g). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT EDWARD BERMAN's and INTERSPACE, INC's. DEMURRERS TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED - with leave to amend to allege a cause of action for quiet title that is not barred by statute of limitations. Complaint fails to allege a cause of action for slander of title. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that statute of limitations re-sets every day Defendant refuses to re-convey the title. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
